metadata.description: Subagents that integrate MeticaSDK into Unity projects in one pass — including projects that already use AppLovin MAX — plus an ad-log-monitor skill for verifying integrations on device.

plugins.name: metica-sdk-agents
plugins.description: Three Claude Code subagents (compat-checker, integrator, validator) for MeticaSDK Unity integration, plus an ad-log-monitor skill for runtime verification.
